steps.title: Use the likely pattern
steps.content: The sentence says respondents were more likely followed by a blank and then common Brazilian foods. In Standard English, more likely is completed by an infinitive: to plus the base form of the verb.

steps.title: Reject finite forms
steps.content: A is a past participle and does not fit after more likely. C is a finite past-tense verb. D is a future verb phrase; it would require a different clause structure. The remaining choice gives the required infinitive. The answer is B.
